title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at NHPC

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at NHPC
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
